name: Glue Bomb
description: Boxes with glue bombs attached. Tap the bomb before the countdown runs out, or it explodes and glues nearby boxes together!
howToPlay: Watch the countdown badge on bomb boxes. Each time you tap ANY box, bomb countdowns decrease by 1. Tap the bomb before it hits 0 to defuse it safely. If it explodes, nearby boxes get glued together with green goo — tapping one glued box taps them all at once!

showcaseLevel.name: Glue Bomb Demo
showcaseLevel.desc: Defuse the bombs or deal with the glue!
